message:
fix(durability): fsync repair_file writes to prevent silent data loss

Replace three `fs::write()` calls in FileProtector::repair_file with
`write_durable()` which performs write_all + sync_all.  Without fsync,
repaired data could be silently lost on power failure — defeating the
purpose of the durability subsystem.

Also extracts a `write_durable()` helper and removes a now-redundant
local `use std::io::Write` (already imported at module level).

Bead: bd-2dp3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
